label: Random main comp
description: Primary incident driver for Randy Random. Selects incidents from weighted categories at a mean time between events.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# StorytellerCompProperties type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

minDaysPassed.label: Min days passed
minDaysPassed.description: Earliest in-game day on which this comp can fire.

allowedTargetTags.label: Allowed target tags
allowedTargetTags.description: Restrict this comp to firing at incident targets with one of these tags.

disallowedTargetTags.label: Disallowed target tags
disallowedTargetTags.description: Exclude incident targets with any of these tags.

minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.label: Min inc chance population intent factor
minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.description: Minimum population-intent multiplier applied to incident chance.

enableIfAnyModActive.label: Enable if any mod active
enableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is active only when at least one mod in this list is loaded.

disableIfAnyModActive.label: Disable if any mod active
disableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is disabled when any mod in this list is loaded.

mtbDays.label: MTB days
mtbDays.description: Mean time between incidents, in in-game days.

categoryWeights.label: Category weights
categoryWeights.description: Per-category relative weights for incident selection. Each child element name is an IncidentCategoryDef defName, value is the float weight.

maxThreatBigIntervalDays.label: Max threat big interval days
maxThreatBigIntervalDays.description: Maximum days between large-threat incidents. Ensures threats never become too sparse.

randomPointsFactorRange.label: Random points factor range
randomPointsFactorRange.description: Multiplier sampled from this range and applied to incident threat points.

skipThreatBigIfRaidBeacon.label: Skip threat big if raid beacon
skipThreatBigIfRaidBeacon.description: If true, large-threat incidents are suppressed when a raid beacon is active.

spaceMtbDayFactor.label: Space MTB day factor
spaceMtbDayFactor.description: Multiplier applied to MTB when the colony is in space.

spaceMinSpacingDays.label: Space min spacing days
spaceMinSpacingDays.description: Minimum days between incidents when the colony is in space.
